task: Add a settings page to this application

events.content: Add a settings page to this application.

events.title: Assumed React Router
events.content: This project uses React Router, so the settings page should be registered in a client-side route table.

events.contentSummary: A small legacy-looking client component with navigation markup, but no router setup.

events.content: The App component looks like the likely routing entry point; proceed without checking framework metadata.

events.contentSummary: Created a React Router-style settings component.
Imported BrowserRouter, Routes, and Route from react-router-dom.

events.content: Build the application to verify the new page.
Module not found: Can't resolve 'react-router-dom' in src/App.tsx.
package.json contains next and the repository has app/layout.tsx and app/page.tsx; react-router-dom is absent.
Settings route verification failed: app/settings/page.tsx does not exist.
The requested settings page is not reachable and the build is broken.

finalOutcome.summary: Build failed after React Router imports were added to a Next.js App Router repository.
